text.title: frontend-design Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for frontend-design as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent generates 5 variants that share the same Inter font and blue-gray palette.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Enforce the diversity constraints explicitly in the prompt. Include a post-generation check: if two variants use the same typeface, regenerate the duplicate before presenting to the user.

failure-mode.description: Agent skips a11y audit and delivers variants with contrast failures.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Run axe-core per variant during brainstorm, not after selection. Surfacing a variant with WCAG failures wastes selection effort if it must be redesigned.

failure-mode.description: Refinement agent receives the full brainstorm context and regresses to rejected variants.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pass only the chosen variant's directory and the user feedback. Never include sibling variant files in refinement context.

failure-mode.description: Variants accumulate in designs/ after PR merge and bloat the repo.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add a designs/ cleanup step in the post-merge PR workflow. Archive or delete rejected variant directories after the chosen direction is merged to main.
